title: Compaction token estimator under-counts CJK/emoji/images — context exhaustion risk
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dimension: Functional Correctness (1)

Location: src/compaction.rs:119-141 estimate_tokens, 144-171 estimate_message_tokens, 153 image hardcode.

Violation: Token estimation is a 4-chars-per-token heuristic with only a +0.5x adjustment for non-ASCII. Real tokenizers treat CJK at ~1 token per char (under-count 33%+). Images hardcoded at 1000 tokens — Anthropic bills ~1600 for hi-res, GPT-4V up to 765+85. COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.85 assumes the estimator is correct within the RESPONSE_RESERVE=4096 margin. When under-counted, compaction fires too late and provider returns context_length_exceeded; when over-counted, it summarizes usable context early.

Mandated Refactor:
1. Integrate tiktoken-rs for OpenAI-family models.
2. Call Anthropic POST /messages/count_tokens for Anthropic (cache per message hash).
3. Widen RESPONSE_RESERVE to 16K when using the heuristic fallback.
4. Property test: estimate within +/-15 percent of tokenizer truth on a sample corpus.
5. Track under-count: when actual_input_tokens exceeds estimate by >20%, log and adjust threshold for subsequent turns.
